backstory.original: Dynaheir, a Wychlaran Invoker hailing from the distant land of Rashemen, travels with her stalwart bodyguard, Minsc. Dynaheir carries a deep-seated animosity toward the Red Wizards of Thay. The mere mention of these hated adversaries sparks a fiery determination in her eyes and a steely edge to her voice, underscoring the intensity of her commitment to the ongoing struggle between the Witches of Rashemen and the Red Wizards.
backstory.display: 戴娜黑是来自遥远的莱瑟曼的女巫议会塑能者，和她忠实的保镖明斯克一同旅行。戴娜黑对扥雷的红袍法师抱有深深的仇恨。只是提到这些仇人，都会令她双眼冒出炽烈的决心，声音如同钢刃般决绝，她对莱瑟曼女巫和红袍法师之间争端的重视和投入一目了然。

description.original: Dynaheir attacks the closest enemy with her trusty sling.
description.display: 戴娜黑用她爱用的弹弓射击距离最近的敌人。

longDescription.original: Dynaheir attacks the closest enemy with her sling, dealing 1 hit.
longDescription.display: 戴娜黑用她的弹弓射击距离最近的敌人，造成 1 次击中。

description.original: Dynaheir flings a lightning bolt at the toughest monster, damaging all enemies in a line.
description.display: 戴娜黑向最强悍的怪物射出一道闪电束，对直线上的所有敌人造成伤害。

longDescription.original: Dynaheir casts a lightning bolt through the target with the most health remaining, dealing 1 ultimate hit to all creatures in a wide line and stunning them for 5 seconds.
longDescription.display: 戴娜黑施放一道闪电束，穿过剩余生命值最多的目标，对宽阔直线上的所有生物造成 1 次杀招攻击，并晕眩被击中者 5 秒。

description.original: Dynaheir increases the damage of all Champions with a Constitution of 15 or higher.
description.display: 戴娜黑使所有体质大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高。

description.original: Dynaheir causes Favored Foes to have a chance to drop double quest items.
description.display: 戴娜黑令偏好对手有机会掉落双倍任务物品。

description.desc: Dynaheir increases the damage of all Champions in the formation with a CON of 15+ by $amount% for each Champion affected by this ability, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位勇士受到此能力影响，戴娜黑提升阵型中所有体质大于 15 的勇士的伤害 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Dynaheir increases the damage of all Champions with a Constitution of 15 or higher. The more high Con Champions, the greater the buff!
tipText.display: 戴娜黑使所有体质大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高。体质越高，勇士获得的增益越强！

description.desc: Humanoid enemies are Dynaheir's Favored Foe. There is a $(amount___2)% chance that an additional Red Wizard spawns with each wave in non-boss areas.
类人生物是戴娜黑的偏好对手。在非首领区域的每一波都有 $(amount___2)% 几率额外刷新一个红袍法师。
All Favored Foes have a $amount% chance to drop double quest items or count for double quest progress.
所有偏好对手有 $amount% 几率掉落双倍任务物品，或者计作双倍任务进度。

tipText.original: Dynaheir causes Favored Foes (like her dislike of Humanoid Red Wizards) to have a chance to drop double quest items.
tipText.display: 戴娜黑令偏好对手（比如她不喜欢类人生物红袍法师）有机会掉落双倍任务物品。

description.desc: Unlocks Dynaheir's Ultimate Attack. She alternates between casting Fireball and Lightning bolt.
解锁戴娜黑的杀招攻击。她会在施放火球术和闪电束之间交替变换。

Dynaheir increases the bonus of The Resolve of Rashemen by $(not_buffed amount)% each time an ally is attacked, up to a maximum of $max_stacks stacks. Stacks apply multiplicatively and reset when changing areas. If Minsc is in the formation, the base effect is increased to $(override_amount___2)%
盟友每次攻击，戴娜黑提升“莱瑟曼的决心”的加成 $(not_buffed amount)%，最多叠加 $max_stacks 层堆叠。以乘算方式堆叠，改变区域时重置。若明斯克列于阵型中，则基础效果提升至 $(override_amount___2)%
Champions in the front-most column of the formation have their Overwhelm increased to $amount, if it wasn't already higher.
若数值未达此值，则阵型最前列勇士的“击溃”提升为 $amount。
Champions that are adjacent to Dynaheir get +$amount___2 CON and the base effect of The Resolve of Rashemen is increased by $amount%.
与戴娜黑相邻的勇士获得 +$amount___2 体质，且“莱瑟曼的决心”的基本效果提升 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Dynaheir uses her circle magic to increase her buff as well as the Constitution of nearby Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 戴娜黑使用圆环魔法提升自身增益和附近勇士的体质。

description.desc: Champions deal $amount% more damage against all Favored Foes.
勇士对所有偏好对手造成 $amount% 额外伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Dynaheir unites her companions to defeat everybody's Favored Foes.
specializationDescription.display: 戴娜黑联合伙伴之力，击败大家的偏好对手。

description.desc: Minsc gains the Tanking role and is eligible for this adventure. His base health increases by 200%, and then further increases by 75% for every 50 areas completed in the current adventure, up to area 600. All other Champions' health is increased by 25% of Minsc's max health.
明斯克获得坦克角色，可在本次冒险中使用过。他的基础生命值提升 200%，且随后在当前冒险中每完成 50 个区域，进一步提升明斯克的生命值 75%，最多到区域 600。其他所有勇士的生命值提升明斯克最大生命值的 25%。

specializationDescription.original: Dynaheir teaches Minsc how to be a tank.
specializationDescription.display: 戴娜黑教给明斯克当坦克的方法。

description.original: My life is not worth more than stopping the Thayans...
description.display: 我的一生只为阻止扥雷人……

description.original: The sun smiles on us! To victory!
description.display: 太阳对我们微笑！去获得胜利吧！

description.original: I've traveled with worse. We can do this.
description.display: 我和更糟的队伍一起旅行过。我们可以做得到的。

description.original: Just keep fighting - I'll make sure you have the power!
description.display: 继续战斗——我会确保你们获得力量的！

description.original: Who brought the Bag of Holding?

description.display: 小心——这些财宝可能被诅咒了！

description.original: This is most optimal for this situation.
Minsc wants to go first - and I think we should let him.
description.display: 明斯克想要身先士卒——我觉得应该让他去。

description.original: Hold! We can weather this storm!
description.display: 撑住！我们撑得过风暴的！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dynaheir's The Unapproachable East ability by $amount.

description.original: I'll do things my way - you do yours in your way.
description.display: 我用自己的方式做事——你用你自己的方式做事。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dynaheir's specializations by $amount%.

description.original: You stand before a true Wychlaran.
description.display: 你面前的是一位真正的女巫议会女巫。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dynaheir's specializations by $amount%.

description.original: You want me to put what in my brain?
description.display: 你想让我把什么放进脑子里？

description.original: Do as I bid, and my power shall be thine.
description.display: 照我吩咐的去做，我的能力就是你的。

effects.description: Increases the CON buff of Dynaheir's Circle Magic specialization by 1

Dynaheir carries a deep-seated animosity toward the Red Wizards of Thay. The mere mention of these hated adversaries sparks a fiery determination in her eyes and a steely edge to her voice, underscoring the intensity of her commitment to the ongoing struggle between the Witches of Rashemen and the Red Wizards.
